title: cirsium × exaltatum
intro: Cirsium × exaltatum, also known as the tall thistle, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the sunflower family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cirsium × exaltatum include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
